mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE ( STORE_NO, STORE_NAME, OWNER_ID, STORE_PHONE, STORE_ADDRESS ) VALUES ( #{storeNo}, #{storeName}, #{ownerId}, #{storePhone}, #{storeAddress} )

INSERT INTO STORE_STOCK ( STORE_NO, MATERIAL_NO, STOCK_QTY )
SELECT #{storeNo}, MATERIAL_NO, 0 FROM MATERIAL
